title: Leaving feedback for sellers | eBay
notes: Buyers can leave positive, neutral, or negative feedback ratings with comments and pictures within 60 days of purchase

title: Pricing and Discounts Terms and Conditions | eBay.com
notes: Sellers must provide accurate List Price throughout listing duration with documentation available within 3 days upon request

title: eBay: Seller Tools: Listing Analytics
notes: Listing analytics tool that transitioned to MySales on Terapeak.com for tracking listing performance

title: Listing Designer
notes: Tool allowing sellers to give listings professional look without HTML knowledge through pre-designed themes and layouts

title: The Listing Quality Report | eBay.com
notes: Downloadable Excel report providing listing analysis at category level for top 10 categories with most live listings

title: Selling templates | eBay
notes: Reusable templates created from Seller Hub to save listing details for similar items

title: How to create and use selling templates
notes: Feature allowing sellers to create and reuse listing templates from Seller Hub

title: Listing upgrades | eBay Developers Program
notes: Optional paid features including subtitle, bold title, gallery plus, and listing designer to make listings stand out

title: Faster and Local Shopping on eBay Just Got Simpler
notes: Suite of delivery solutions including local pickup with QR codes and eBay Local program for last-mile delivery

title: Offering local pickup | eBay
notes: Feature allowing sellers to offer local pickup with secure QR code verification system for in-person exchanges

title: eBay Launches Secure Local Pickup To Simplify The Shipping Experience
notes: Enhanced local pickup feature with QR code system developed during 2018 Hack Week

title: eBay launches fulfilment for UK sellers to deliver end-to-end logistics management - eBay Inc.
notes: eBay Fulfillment by Orange Connex launched in UK July 2021, offering next-day delivery and dedicated fulfillment centers

title: Neue Services und zusätzliche Partner: eBay baut sein Fulfillment Programm in Deutschland weiter aus - eBay Inc.
notes: eBay Fulfillment by Orange Connex beta launched in Germany fall 2020, managing logistics and shipping for commercial sellers

title: 'Magical' Listing Tool Harnesses the Power of AI to Make Selling on eBay Faster, Easier, and More Accurate
notes: AI-powered listing tool using image recognition to auto-populate titles, descriptions, and item details; won 2024 AI Breakthrough Award

title: Making a Best Offer | eBay
notes: Feature allowing buyers to make offers on listings, with sellers having 24 hours to accept, decline, or counter-offer

title: Offer to buyers
notes: Sellers can send custom offers to buyers who send questions, with up to 3 offers allowed per item valid for 96 hours

title: Making a Best Offer | eBay
notes: Best Offer button on eligible listings allowing buyers to negotiate price; eBay adds this automatically to some listings

title: eBay Makes It Easier with Three New Ways for Sellers to Send Offers to Buyers
notes: Enhanced offer system including Seller Initiated Offers with personalized messages to buyers watching items or with items in cart

title: eBay to Launch Managed Delivery, an End-to-end Fulfillment Service for Sellers
notes: Defunct U.S. fulfillment pilot announced 2019, closed December 2019; replaced by international fulfillment services in UK, Germany, China

title: eBay's Management of Payments Begins Scaling Globally
notes: eBay's payment platform supporting 150+ currencies and 200+ payment methods via Adyen, now live in all global markets

title: eBay: Managed Returns process
notes: Automated returns process for opt-in sellers that streamlines communications, label generation, and refund processing

title: eBay Shakes Up and Smooths Out the Returns Process
notes: Managed returns pilot launched July 10 for select sellers, went public on opt-in basis for Top-rated sellers

title: Tracking items you've sold | eBay
notes: Feature allowing sellers to manually mark items as shipped from Orders tab or add tracking numbers after shipping

title: eBay Stores: Optimize Your Listings
notes: eBay Stores exclusive feature for discounts and free shipping; merged into Promotions Manager as Sale Event + Markdown

title: Automatic bidding | eBay
notes: Automatic bidding system where buyers enter maximum bid amount and eBay bids incrementally up to that limit on their behalf

title: Merchant Integration Platform | eBay Developers Program
notes: Feed-based platform for bulk inventory management via CSV/XML files for enterprise merchants and high-volume sellers

title: User Agreement | eBay
notes: eBay's official messaging system for buyer-seller communication referenced in User Agreement for notifications

title: User Agreement | eBay
notes: Official communication platform for eBay users with updated chat-style format and threaded messaging on mobile

title: eBay Launches Venmo as a Payment Option, a Continued Push to Expand Ways to Pay and Invest in Digital Natives
notes: Over 60% of eBay volume comes from mobile devices; eBay developed Checkout Experience Service for multi-screen checkout

title: eBay Launches the "Summer of Choice" Letting Americans Vote for Their Favorite Mobile Deals All Season Long
notes: Campaign allowing users to vote for mobile-exclusive seasonal deals on fashion, tech, and home items with free shipping

title: Push Notifications-based 2-step Verification - Innovation Stories
notes: Push notification system using FIDO UAF 1.0 protocol for authentication and real-time business event notifications

title: eBay Empowers Sellers with Innovative Tools at eBay Open 2024
notes: Dedicated Sell Mode announced at eBay Open 2024 providing customized selling experience in mobile app for on-the-go management

title: eBay: Mobile - Mobile Web
notes: Mobile web platform with WebAuthn biometric authentication, Progressive Web Apps, and AMP technology for 16M+ product pages

title: eBay Money Back Guarantee policy
notes: Automatic coverage for most eBay transactions when items don't arrive, are faulty/damaged, or don't match listing within 30 days
